items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
#Monogram Woc#
Latest Version_#Black Black Buckle#
Monogram caviar leather envelope bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% original cowhide paired with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo adds a personal touch; flip-top design ensures security. Small bag with large capacity, featuring 10 card slots, two bill compartments, two central pockets, and one zippered interior pocket. Fits everything!
Model: 26801
Size: 22.5x14x4cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
New Cloud-shaped underarm chain bag has arrived! It has a unique curved shape that fits the underarm curve perfectly, making it super comfortable to use! Made from soft, wrinkled original cowhide, it has a unique look and a high-quality texture! The bag is very light overall, adding no burden to use. Just pick it up and go! The overall design is retro and elegant, and the opening features a one-piece molded hardware hinge design for greater convenience in daily use!
Model: 681632
Size: 24x14x2cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Must-have. Conquered the fashion world before launch. Nostalgic Rive Gauche, named after the Paris street Rue De Solferino! The bag features original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin with excellent texture and flexibility. The interior features a three-panel accordion pocket for daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter clasp opens vertically, completely redefining your perception of bag clasps. It's simply too fun!
Model: 2020
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Top Original Quality】【SOLFERINO BOX】Turquoise
2020 IT BAG_ Must-have hot style, conquered the entire fashion circle before it even launched! Inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stitched Box calfskin, excellent texture and flexibility! Interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top and bottom half-open clasp completely subverts your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, "It can actually open like this," simply too interesting!
Model: 634306
Size: 19×13×5cm
